title: Surface EMG-Based Wrist and Hand Estimation
description: Postdoctoral research at the Universidad Autónoma de Querétaro focused on continuous surface electromyography-based wrist and hand estimation, system identification, and human motor intention modeling.

title: Reinforcement Learning from Expert Demonstrations
description: Development of reinforcement learning and imitation learning methods that incorporate expert demonstrations to guide exploration and improve robot behavior learning.

title: Robust Multi-Agent Policy Optimization
description: Collaboration on robust multi-agent policy optimization via reinforcement learning under model uncertainty.

title: Traffic Accident Data Analysis
description: Data analysis project with accident database records, focused on extracting useful metrics and patterns for applied research.
